source_final_event.action_result: Kathy Sullivan
source_final_event.environment_state: Kathy Jean Martin "Kathy" Sullivan AM (born 8 March 1942), Australian politician, was a Liberal member of the Australian Senate from 1974 to 1984, representing Queensland, and a member of the House of Representatives for the Division of Moncrieff, Queensland, from 1984 to 2001. This record has since been surpassed by Bronwyn Bishop.
